evidence.snippet: Silvus is reshaping broadband wireless connectivity for mission critical applications. We design and develop advanced MANET radios, mesh network systems and capabilities that set a new standard for high-speed data transmission in any operational environment.

In 2011, Silvus introduced the world’s first tactical MIMO radios – and we’re still pushing the industry forward today. Our background in DARPA-funded R&D paved the way for robust wireless networking for high-stakes industries such as military, law enforcement, and broadcast.

items.notes: Core product line is StreamCaster family of MANET radios — data links for UAV/UGV/USV platforms

evidence.snippet: _New low-SWaP spectrum sensor delivers industry-leading 144.5 THz/s spectrum scanning, redefining the benchmark for mobile SIGINT, EW and distributed RF sensing operations_

Designed for the tactical edge, this handheld radio signal detection system packs the performance of a much larger device into an ultra-low size, weight and power (SWaP) form factor. It’s purposefully designed for on-the-move signals intelligence operations and rapidly deployable RF sensing networks, providing warfighters and unmanned systems operators with critical situational awareness in contested environments.

items.notes: FASST 6000 spectrum sensor for SIGINT, EW, and distributed RF sensing at the tactical edge

evidence.snippet: Silvus products are designed, assembled, and tested at our Headquarters in Los Angeles, California. Silvus Technologies is now part of Motorola Solutions.

*   #### SILVUS TECHNOLOGIES, INC.,
    10990 Wilshire Blvd., Suite #1600
    Los Angeles, CA 90024 U.S.A.

Designed for today’s leading-edge [unmanned systems](https://silvustechnologies.com/applications/unmanned-systems/), the SL5200 delivers the performance of StreamCaster MANET radios in an ultra-low SWaP OEM module.
Compact and powerfully versatile, the SL5200 unifies C2, sensor & telemetry data with communications relay capabilities – enabling seamless integration into a wide range of tactical applications.

*   Non-rugged OEM (for embedding in custom products and sub-systems
*   JETDAS Model: AN/PRC-169(v)1; AN/VRC-147(v)1;

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Silvus sells MANET radio hardware that integrates into drone platforms as data links; SL5200 is explicitly an OEM PCB module for embedding in unmanned systems. Also offers non-rugged OEM PCB stacks of the SC4400E for embedding in custom products.

evidence.snippet: Silvus Technologies Introduces the FASST™ 6000 Spectrum Sensor
_DoD’s innovation unit and AUVSI, a leading autonomous innovation industry group, validate expanded portfolio of Silvus NDAA compliant radios for secure use in unmanned missions_

The National Defense Authorization Act-compliant SC4400E joins the StreamCaster SC4200EP, StreamCaster LITE SL4200 and SL5200 MANET radios on the Blue UAS Framework and Green UAS Cleared Components list.
SC4200EP is NDAA and DoD cybersecurity compliant, and is approved for use in conjunction with Blue UAS platforms.

ndaa.notes: SC4400E, SC4200EP, SL5200, and SL4200 all confirmed NDAA compliant across multiple pages.

evidence.snippet: The National Defense Authorization Act-compliant SC4400E joins the StreamCaster SC4200EP, StreamCaster LITE SL4200 and SL5200 MANET radios on the Blue UAS Framework and Green UAS Cleared Components list.
SC4200EP is NDAA and DoD cybersecurity compliant, and is approved for use in conjunction with Blue UAS platforms.

blue_uas.notes: SC4400E, SC4200EP, SL5200, and SL4200 are all on the DIU Blue UAS Framework cleared list.

evidence.snippet: In 2011, Silvus leveraged this MIMO communication expertise to develop a commercial product line, which is today known as the StreamCaster family of MANET radios. Ever since, Silvus has demonstrated a very aggressive product development cycle, with a focus on continually improving the size, weight, power, and cost–while simultaneously introducing next-generation features and capabilities.

Today, Silvus continues to innovate, with an ever-growing lineup of R&D contracts, COTS products, and happy customers. The experience gained through our early research efforts made possible the first generation of StreamCaster radios, and new concepts currently incubating in our R&D labs will pave the way for tomorrow’s product breakthroughs.

readiness.notes: Commercial COTS product line in production since 2011 with an ever-growing lineup of catalog SKUs, downloadable datasheets, and named firmware updates.

tagline: Manufacturer of Mobile-Networked MIMO (MN-MIMO) MANET radios and mesh-networking systems for tactical unmanned, airborne, and ground applications. StreamCaster product family spans ultra-low-SWaP OEM modules (SL5200, SM5200) to high-power fixed/vehicular systems (SC4400E/X); all carry NDAA compliance and Blue UAS certification. Also produces FASST 6000 spectrum sensor for SIGINT/direction-finding. Public evidence of production maturity and fielding is strong; integration scope and actual program adoption remain proprietary.
